fullText:
Adventure Coaster (Japanese: アドベンチャーコースター) was a steel water roller coaster previously located at Odakyu Mukogaoka Yuen in Kawasaki, Kanagawa, Japan.



Yellow track and green supports.

The cars were designed to feature an african theme.


 * Adventure Coaster on the parks website (In Japanese)
 * Pictures of Adventure Coaster (In Japanese)
